OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, e.g. 'flashpoint'.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

CTM360_THREATCOVER_API_ROOT_URL.description: CTM360 ThreatCover TAXII 2.1 API root URL (tenant specific).

CTM360_THREATCOVER_API_TOKEN.description: CTM360 ThreatCover API token (sent as the TAXII Authorization header).

CTM360_THREATCOVER_COLLECTION_ID.description: TAXII collection id to poll (the ThreatCover 'Observables' collection).

CTM360_THREATCOVER_TLP_LEVEL.description: Default TLP level applied to the imported entities.

CTM360_THREATCOVER_VERIFY_SSL.description: Whether to verify the TAXII server TLS certificate.
